landing.badge: 🇮🇳 Free Legal Awareness for Every Citizen
landing.title: Understand Your Legal Rights
landing.subtitle: NyaySathi helps citizens access legal information, discover government schemes, and understand legal procedures — all in simple language.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Empowering citizens with accessible legal knowledge
landing.feature1Desc: Ask legal questions in plain language and get clear, easy-to-understand answers.
landing.feature2Desc: Discover schemes you're eligible for based on your profile.
landing.feature3Desc: Upload legal documents and get simplified summaries.
landing.feature4Desc: Find nearby legal aid offices and free legal services.
landing.howItWorksSubtitle: Get legal help in three simple steps
landing.step1Desc: Type or speak your legal question in your preferred language.
landing.step2Desc: Our AI explains your rights and procedures in simple terms.
landing.step3Desc: Find relevant schemes, download documents, or contact legal aid.
landing.impactSubtitle: NyaySathi bridges the gap between citizens and the legal system by providing free, multilingual legal awareness.
landing.disclaimer: ⚠️ NyaySathi provides legal information only and is not a substitute for a lawyer. For legal advice, please consult a qualified legal professional.

dashboard.subtitle: How can NyaySathi help you today?

assistant.title: AI Legal Assistant
assistant.subtitle: Ask any legal question
assistant.greeting: Namaste! 🙏 I'm NyaySathi, your AI legal assistant. Ask me any legal question in English, Hindi, or Marathi and I'll explain it in simple language.
assistant.errorMessage: Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again.

rights.title: Legal Rights Explorer
rights.womenDesc: Indian law provides strong protections for women against domestic violence, workplace harassment, and discrimination.
rights.cyberDesc: Cybercrime laws in India cover online fraud, identity theft, cyberstalking, and data breaches under the IT Act 2000.
rights.consumerDesc: The Consumer Protection Act 2019 protects buyers against defective products, deficient services, and unfair trade practices.
rights.labourDesc: Labour laws protect workers' rights including minimum wages, working conditions, and social security benefits.
rights.propertyDesc: Property laws govern the purchase, sale, transfer, and inheritance of immovable property in India.
rights.rtiDesc: The Right to Information Act 2005 empowers citizens to request information from public authorities.

schemes.emptyState: Fill in your details and click "Find Schemes" to discover eligible government schemes.
